info.title: COLD START
info.author: etonedemid
info.details: COLD START is a top-down action shooter built in C++ with SDL2 for PC and Nintendo Switch homebrew. It combines fast combat, local content editing, multiplayer support, and a lightweight modding pipeline aimed at rapid iteration.

changelog:
v1.6.0\nv1.6.0 (2026-05-25)\n- Music player overhaul- — tracks now advance sequentially (no skipping); .ogg format supported alongside .mp3; artist name displayed below track title in pause player; loop toggle no longer restarts the current track\n- Low-HP vignette- — screen fades to red below 40% HP, pulses at critical HP (≤20%), and smoothly reverts on healing\n- Editor Win98 UI- — toolbar and palette panel fully converted to Win98 style; config screen defaults to 50×50 maps; width/height fields accept keyboard input directly\n- HUD cleanup- — timer removed from the STATUS panel; GAME panel widened to fit text\n\nv1.5.1\nSee README.md: README.mdchangelog for the full changelog.\n\nv1.5.0\nSee README.md: README.mdchangelog for the full changelog.\n\nv1.4.1\nSee README.md: README.mdchangelog for the full changelog.\n\nv1.3.0
- Disable post-processing shader composite in splitscreen
- Fix P1 primary gamepad routing in local multiplayer network sessions
- Add gamepad crosshair for P1 across gameplay modes
- Refresh README and HB App Store screenshots

v1.2.0
- Controller rumble support
- Automatic update checker
- Unified menu + creator overhaul
- Multiplayer character sync completed
- Full multiplayer mod sync
- Mod sync hardening

v1.1.1
- Security: mod sync path traversal fix
- Character creator rebuilt
- PNG sprite import
- Enhanced parry system
- Player sprites upscaled
- Texture editor removed
